📊 Riyadh IT job market — week of Jun 8 – Jun 14

253 new IT job openings appeared on Riyadh job boards this week.

🔥 Most in-demand areas:
1. IT Management — 35 roles
2. Data Acquisition — 35 roles
3. Data Sharing — 32 roles
4. IT Project Manager — 30 roles
5. Data Management — 26 roles
6. Program Manager — 25 roles

🏢 Actively hiring: Müller's Solutions, Qiddiya | القدية, Riyadh Air | طيران الرياض
